verifiedCues: 학사요람 landing page rendered from the initPageWork.do SSO entry
과거 학사요람 조회 revealed year buttons including 2025/2024/2023/2022/2021/2020/2019
전공별 교과과정 exposed target department tree entries
viewer iframes exposed streamdocsId values that can be queried via the StreamDocs metadata endpoint

notes: Wave 1.5 keeps the 2019-2025 source-slot matrix explicit for every AE/ME/CS/EE x year x document-type slot in bulletin-document-inventory.json.

Repeated 2019 re-checks confirmed that the live 2019 major tree currently surfaces 전산학부 and 전기및전자공학부, but not AE/ME labels; the 2019 AE/ME slots are therefore classified as missing in the current verified workflow.
2019 CS/EE list and overview tabs became reachable after department selection and now have captured viewer provenance.
The former 2020/2021/2023/2024 duplicate suspicions were resolved by observing that document-tab clicks append new viewer iframes instead of replacing the first iframe.
